summary: Tested new features: Asia Head role in Admin Team dropdown and enhanced Referrals Dashboard with recharts. All features working correctly. Frontend 100% - all tested features pass.
passed_tests: Admin Team tab shows role dropdown with all 5 roles: CEO, CFO, COO, Marketing Head, Asia Head
Asia Head option is selectable in the dropdown
Can add a new team member with Asia Head role - saves successfully
Can delete team member with Asia Head role
Referrals page shows 'Connect Your Wallet' prompt when wallet not connected
Connect Wallet button is displayed with data-testid='connect-wallet-referrals'
Referrals page loads without console errors
Recharts components (AreaChart, PieChart, BarChart) are properly imported in Referrals.jsx
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts imports in Referrals.jsx are correct and follow best practices
Asia Head role is properly added as the 5th option in the team dropdown (line 975-979)
The Referrals page correctly handles wallet connection state - shows prompt when disconnected
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Asia_Head_Member team member during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Admin Dashboard Team tab now has 'Asia Head' role in dropdown (5 total roles: CEO, CFO, COO, Marketing Head, Asia Head). 2) Referrals page has enhanced UI with recharts components - shows connect wallet prompt when not connected. Charts (AreaChart for earnings, PieChart for team distribution, BarChart for level earnings) will display when wallet is connected and user has referral data. Note: Full chart testing requires wallet connection which is not possible in automated testing environment.
